tools.name: getPromptMeta
tools.description: Retrieves orchestration metadata for a Crafted Intelligence companion prompt. Returns the extension record data: domain, toolset, tool chain, steps, edition, params, safety rules, governance level, and artifact hints. The AI calls this as its FIRST step when executing any Crafted prompt — it provides the full orchestration context needed to invoke the correct tools in the correct order. Pass either the Atlas prompt internal ID or the Crafted external ID (aiprompt_crafted_*). STUB — not yet implemented.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Atlas AI Companion prompt record (customrecord_atlas_aicomp_prompts).

externalId.description: External ID of the Atlas prompt (e.g., 'aiprompt_crafted_barrel_001'). Used if promptId is not provided.

error.description: Error message if tool is not yet implemented or if lookup fails.

tools.name: seedPrompt
tools.description: Creates an Atlas AI Companion prompt and its Crafted extension record in a single idempotent operation. If a prompt with the given externalId already exists, returns the existing record instead of creating a duplicate. Used to programmatically seed domain prompts (e.g., barrel intelligence, lot profitability) into the Companion Library. STUB — not yet implemented.

externalId.description: Unique external ID for idempotent creation (e.g., 'aiprompt_crafted_barrel_003').

promptText.description: Clean, user-facing prompt text. No orchestration metadata — that goes in the extension record.

domain.description: Crafted domain: 'Barrel Operations', 'Lot Profitability', 'Inventory & Supply Chain', 'Compliance & Audit', 'MRP Intelligence', 'Batch & Genealogy'.

error.description: Error message if tool is not yet implemented or if creation fails.

tools.name: updatePrompt
tools.description: Updates an existing Atlas companion prompt text and/or its Crafted extension record fields. Bumps the version field on the extension record. Only provided fields are updated — omitted fields are left unchanged. STUB — not yet implemented.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Atlas prompt to update.

promptText.description: New prompt text. If omitted, prompt text is not changed.

version.description: New semantic version (e.g., '1.1.0'). If omitted, version is auto-incremented.

error.description: Error message if tool is not yet implemented or if update fails.

tools.name: logExecution
tools.description: Creates a lightweight execution log record for a companion prompt run. Records which prompt was executed, which tools were called, whether it succeeded, duration, and which prompt version was running. Called by the AI after completing (or failing) a prompt execution. STUB — not yet implemented.

promptId.description: Internal ID of the Atlas prompt that was executed.

toolsCalled.description: JSON array of tool names called during execution (e.g., '["getBarrelProfile","getBarrelCostTrace"]').

error.description: Error message if execution failed. Empty on success.
Error message if tool is not yet implemented or if logging fails.
